response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'だれかの心臓になれたなら' from the on-screen text. Used search query '"だれかの心臓になれたなら" original artist Japanese and English lyrics' to identify YurryCanon as the artist and found both original and English lyrics. The second half of the video is a dialogue segment with no music.
response.global_summary: A performance segment of the song 'Dareka no Shinzou ni Naretanara' by Murasaki Shion, followed by a dialogue scene between Shion and YAGOO.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs the song 'Dareka no Shinzou ni Naretanara' on stage with elaborate lighting and stage effects. The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: だれかの心臓になれたなら (Dareka no Shinzou ni Naretanara)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「こんな世界」と嘆くだれかの 生きる理由になれるでしょうか
これは僕が いま君に贈る 最初で最期の愛の言葉だ

街も人も歪み出した 化け物だと気付いたんだ
思い通りの日々じゃないけど 脆く弱い糸に繋がれた

次の夜明けがまた訪れる どんな世界も君がいるなら 生きていたいって思えたんだよ
僕の地獄で君はいつでも 絶えず鼓動する心臓だ

いつしか君がくれたように 僕も、だれかの心臓になれたなら
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"What a world," you lament. Can I be a reason for you to live?
This is the first and final declaration of love I give to you now.

The city and the people began to warp, and I realized they were monsters.
It's not the days I hoped for, but I'm tied by fragile, weak threads.

The next dawn will come again. If you are here, I thought I'd want to live in any world.
In my hell, you are the heart that is always beating.

Just as you gave me one day, if I too, could become someone's heart.
